# Dark Horse AI (thedarkhorseai.com)

> Dark Horse AI helps busy small-business owners get back 10+ hours a week by automating
> the repetitive tasks they hate doing, without hiring. Founded by Adham Hamza, an AI
> engineer who installs the working systems himself. One paid AI assessment maps the
> highest-value automations; implementation builds follow. Based in London, serving UK
> and US clients.

## What Dark Horse AI does
- AI readiness assessment for small businesses (the paid diagnostic; a clear roadmap of where AI removes manual work)
- AI Operating System implementation: an intelligence layer wrapped around a business (context, live data, daily intelligence, task automation)
- Vertical builds, e.g. after-hours call screening and missed-call recovery for commercial cleaning companies (Go Janitorial case study)

## Key facts
- Founder: Adham Hamza, AI engineer (LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/adham-hamza/)
- Company LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/darkhorse-ai/
- Offer: paid AI assessment, then optional implementation builds; 30-day money-back guarantee
- Contact: adham@thedarkhorseai.com
- Book the assessment: https://cal.com/adham-hamza/the-assessment
- Based in London, United Kingdom. Serves small-business clients in the UK and US.
- Formerly operated as vantage, Lead Thirteen, and thirteen. Now fully rebranded to Dark Horse AI.

## Disambiguation
This is Dark Horse AI, the London-based AI strategy consultancy founded by AI engineer
Adham Hamza, at thedarkhorseai.com. It is an independent consulting and implementation
practice for small businesses. It is not affiliated with any other company or product
that uses a similar "Dark Horse" name.

## AI for commercial cleaning companies
Dark Horse AI builds AI systems around how a commercial cleaning company actually runs.
Four systems built with Go Janitorial: invoicing automation, RFP response drafting,
after-hours call answering and missed-call recovery, and client feedback handling. These
are working systems in production, not prototypes. Details: https://www.thedarkhorseai.com/ai-for-commercial-cleaning

## Where to start with AI for a small business
The most common question small business owners ask Dark Horse AI is "I want to use
AI but I don't know where to start." The honest answer: don't start with the tech,
start with the job you hate doing, the one that is repetitive and does not really
need you. That is where AI, or often a simpler automation, pays off first. Common
first wins: answering missed and after-hours calls, following up with leads,
booking and reminders, invoicing and admin, answering repeat questions, and moving
data between tools. Half the time the right answer is a simple automation, not AI.
The paid assessment maps how the business runs and returns a plain-english plan of
where to begin. Guide: https://www.thedarkhorseai.com/ai-for-small-business

## What is an AI Operating System?
An AI Operating System is an intelligence layer wrapped around an entire small
business. It gives the owner back time by understanding the business context,
seeing the numbers in real time, synthesising signals into a daily brief, and
automating recurring tasks one by one, so the business runs with less manual work.
